[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

1 000011100 3
2 010110100 4
3 100101100 4
4 111111100 7
5 011111101 7
6 101101011 6
7 011001011 5

70 07 011000011 4
